meaning: n.涓嶆硶,绉佺敓,鍙嶅父,涓嶅悎閫昏緫
examples: In most of Asia, marriage is widespread and illegitimacy almost unknown.
Battune Sinister - Marks a royal descent that is barred by illegitimacy from succession to the throne.
In the context of consuming mainstream music and movies, the word reverberates with illegitimacy.
The social stigma of illegitimacy has disappeared, and single parent families are considered part of the norm.
